beats.n_start: {OPENING_MOMENT} over {THRESHOLD}; high above, {HERO}, {HERO_ROLE}, wakes up in {HOME} and rubs her eyes; tonight is her very first night to shine all by herself
beats.n_moon: {COMPANION} rises slowly and smiles at {HERO}; {COMPANION} whispers that {THRESHOLD} is waiting for her little light; {HERO} feels fluttery and shy in her tummy, so she squeezes her {HERO_FEATURE} tight and gets ready to be brave
beats.n_ready: {HERO} floats to {ENTRANCE} and wonders how to start shining; she could hide behind {ROUTE_A_CHAR} first, or do {ROUTE_B_CHAR} to wake up her sparkle, or scoot down to peek at {ROUTE_C_CHAR}
beats.n_cloud: {HERO} tucks herself behind {ROUTE_A_CHAR} so only the very tip of her glow peeks out; {ROUTE_A_CHAR} is soft and cozy, but {ENTRANCE} stays dark and empty; she can snuggle deeper into {ROUTE_A_CHAR} or peek out one tiny sparkle
beats.n_cozy_retry: deep in {ROUTE_A_CHAR} {HERO} rests a little while and {COMPANION} hums one soft low note; {ROUTE_A_CHAR} tickles her nose and she giggles a tiny giggle; the rest makes her feel a little braver, so she floats back toward {ENTRANCE} to try again
beats.n_peek: one tiny sparkle slips out and drifts all the way down to {THRESHOLD}, where {A2_FIND} blinks hello back up at her; {HERO} gasps with joy, her little light reached somebody; her glow steadies and grows a bit warmer and bolder
beats.n_wiggle: {HERO} wiggles and jiggles to wake up her sparkle, and {WIGGLE_GLITTER} shakes off her {HERO_FEATURE} in every direction; it is very fun but very wobbly, and her light flickers like a hiccup; she can wiggle even faster or slow down and sway like a lullaby
beats.n_giggle_retry: {HERO} wiggles so fast she spins in a dizzy circle and plops onto {B1_LANDING}, giggling; her sparkle goes all fizzy like tiny bubbles; {COMPANION} chuckles kindly and says gently does it, little one, so she dusts off her {HERO_FEATURE} and floats back to try again
beats.n_sway: {HERO} sways slowly, side to side, like {B2_SCENE}; her sparkle settles into one warm, steady glow; the swaying feels just like a lullaby and she hums along softly, calm and ready at last
beats.n_slide: {HERO} scoots down {THRESHOLD} to peek at {ROUTE_C_CHAR}, but whoops, {THRESHOLD} is slippery tonight and she slides down, down, down to just above {SLIDE_LOW}; she can grab a {CLIMB_AID} and climb right back up, or take a little peek around from down low
beats.n_low: from down low {HERO} sees {LOW_HOUSES}, and {CHILDREN} peeking up, waiting for {HERO_ROLE}; her heart glows warm as toast; {CHILDREN} need her light tonight, so she floats up and up toward {ENTRANCE}
beats.n_almost: back at {ENTRANCE}, {THRESHOLD} finally feels just right, soft and dark and quiet as a blanket; {COMPANION} nods proudly and the whole night seems to wait; {HERO} can try one tiny practice sparkle first, or hold onto a {CLIMB_AID} and shine all at once
beats.n_first_sparkle: {HERO} lets out one small practice sparkle and it glows steady and bright, not wobbly at all; she laughs out loud with happy surprise; her shyness floats away like a little cloud, and now she is truly ready to shine her whole light
beats.n_shine: {HERO} takes the biggest breath of all and shines, and her silver light spills soft and bright across {THRESHOLD}; {COMPANION} beams with pride; now {HERO} can wink goodnight to {CHILDREN} below, or sing {LULLABY_SONG} with {COMPANION}, or invite {OTHER_STARS} to shine along
beats.e_goodnight: {HERO} twinkles a slow, gentle goodnight wink, and far below {CHILDREN} wave from their windows and snuggle into their beds; {THRESHOLD} grows quiet and dreamy under her soft silver light; {HERO} shines calm and proud, {HERO_ROLE}, right where she belongs
beats.e_lullaby: {HERO} and {COMPANION} hum {LULLABY_SONG} together while {THRESHOLD} rocks slow and gentle like a cradle; her light glows in time with the tune; down below, sleepy eyes close one by one; {HERO} sings the whole world to sleep and is not one bit shy anymore
beats.e_friends: {HERO} calls out softly and one by one {OTHER_STARS} pop out beside her, blinking hello until {THRESHOLD} is full of friendly lights; shining is easy with friends all around; {HERO} glows happiest of all, {HERO_ROLE} who lit up the whole night

n_almost.c_almost_all: Hold a {CLIMB_AID} and shine all at once.
